---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in specsmith
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## To Reproduce
```bash
specsmith <command> <options>
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include full error output).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12.10]
- specsmith version: [e.g., 0.1.0a4]
- Project type: [e.g., cli-python, patent-application]

## scaffold.yml / specsmith.yml (if applicable)
```yaml
# paste relevant config
```

---
> **Terminal/UI bug?** File it in [kairos](https://github.com/BitConcepts/kairos/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) instead.
